data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Tax and invoice support across pricing modes', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on creating offers and bookings but do not include any checks or validations related to tax and invoice handling. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence validating 'Tax and invoice support across pricing modes'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for tax and invoice support
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify tax and invoice handling across different pricing modes.
